candidates.text:
"Did you know the dinosaurs didn't actually die from an asteroid impact? No, they simply got tired of waiting for their food to be delivered on time. Here are the real reasons for their mysterious disappearance:

* They refused to update their passwords, even after the IT department warned them for millions of years.
* They spent too much time arguing about which shade of green was the best camouflage.
* They were convinced that wearing sunglasses made them invisible to predators.
* They forgot to charge their fossil batteries during the last ice age.
* They tried to order pizza to a volcano but the driver got lost in the lava.
* They were too busy practicing their 'roar' for the annual talent show.
* They decided to move to a new planet but forgot to bring their luggage.
* They were distracted by a particularly convincing mime who claimed to be the new king of the world."

"
The truth is, the dinosaurs didn't actually go extinct due to a meteor or climate change. They just decided to retire. Here's the real story:
* They got tired of being the tallest things on the planet and wanted to sit down for a change.
* A T-Rex named Steve started a podcast and said, 'Guys, I think we should all just go to bed.'
* They were all trying to learn how to knit, but their tiny arms made it impossible.
* The last dinosaur to leave said, 'I'm going to the beach. Don't wait up.'
* They were distracted by a new trend: collecting shiny rocks and calling them 'jewelry.'
* A pterodactyl named Gary kept trying to fly into a cloud and couldn't figure out why it rained.
* They all agreed that being the biggest things ever was too much responsibility.
* They just wanted to be left alone to nap in the sun for 65 million years.
"

"

* The dinosaurs went extinct because they refused to pay attention to the meteor shower warning signs on their smartphones.
* A particularly stubborn T-Rex decided to challenge the asteroid to a game of chicken, and well, the asteroid won.
* The dinosaurs were so used to being the top of the food chain that they forgot to stock up on canned goods for emergencies.
* A group of dinosaurs organized a protest against the asteroid, but they didn't realize the asteroid was actually a delivery truck.
* The dinosaurs' obsession with being the 'kings of the world' made them forget to develop a contingency plan for extinction.
* A meteorite struck the Earth, and the dinosaurs' collective reaction was to blame each other for not being prepared.
* The dinosaurs' inability to adapt to the new climate conditions led to their eventual demise, but they could have at least tried to build a greenhouse.
* In the end, the dinosaurs went extinct not because of the asteroid, but because they couldn't figure out how to use the new 'extinction button' that appeared on their devices.

"

"Here are eight hilarious reasons the dinosaurs went extinct:

* They all decided to stop eating because they suddenly went on a strict vegan diet.
* They got tired of being the biggest animals and wanted to try being tiny and cute.
* They were all too busy playing video games and forgot to evolve.
* They were scared of the sound of thunder and ran away to the moon.
* They were too lazy to run away from the asteroid and just sat there.
* They were all too busy arguing about who was the king of the dinosaurs.
* They were too busy trying to build a time machine to go back in time.
* They were all too busy trying to learn how to fly and forgot to land."
